text: Stepping into this space, with its modern glass walls and bold R+D display, I feel a mixture of curiosity and contemplation. The atmosphere is sharpened by the interplay between technology and knowledge—screens and books coexisting on the same vibrant wall. There is a sense that ideas are being tested and boundaries explored, which makes me eager to reflect further on the evolving relationship between humans and machines. The sterile brightness and sharp edges foster a quiet anticipation about what innovation might be born here.
